hypothesis: If non-negativity and sum-to-one regularizations are integrated into a diffusion-based generative model (PCDiff) with appropriate weighting coefficients α1 and α2, then PCDiff will generate a significantly higher proportion of physically valid and fabricable composite material compositions (higher Validityreg and Validityfab) while maintaining comparable density and coverage to CVAE and TabDDPM, because the constraints explicitly enforce compositional feasibility during generation.
